# Generate Reactive To PM Intelligence

Read `AGENT.md` first.

Then read every file in `.github/skills/`.

Treat those files as the canonical operating model for this repository.

Then design and generate the full Reactive to PM Intelligence application end to end, following the mandated execution order, delivery requirements, and quality gates.

Execution rules:

1. Do not ask clarifying questions unless genuinely blocked.
2. Do not stop at planning; implement the solution.
3. Prefer a clean, production-intentioned structure.
4. Finish with tests, documentation, deployment assets, and end-to-end validation.

Start execution immediately.
